name: Mesh
summary: The Mesh class represents a mesh for drawing three-dimensional data.

constructors.name: Mesh()
constructors.summary: Creates a new empty mesh instance.

constructors.name: Mesh(ArrayList, ArrayList, ArrayList)
constructors.signature: public Mesh(ArrayList Points, ArrayList Triangles, ArrayList Lines)
constructors.summary: Creates a new mesh instance with the given points, triangles and lines. Does not check the indices in the given triangles and lines array lists for correctness.

params.name: Points
params.doc: An array list of point objects representing the mesh points. Null represents no points.

params.name: Triangles
params.doc: An array list of indices (of type integer) pointing to the points array list. Three consecutive indices represent a single triangle. The first index is 0. If null, the mesh will not contain any triangles.

params.name: Lines
params.doc: An array list of indices (of type integer) pointing to the points array list. Two consecutive indices represent a single line. The first index is 0. If null, the mesh will not contain any lines.

methods.name: AddLine
methods.signature: public void AddLine(int Index1, int Index2)
methods.summary: Adds a new line in the mesh.

params.name: Index1
params.doc: The index of the line's start point in the points array list.

params.name: Index2
params.doc: The index of the line's end point in the points array list.

methods.name: AddPoint
methods.summary: Adds a new point in the mesh.

params.name: Point
params.doc: The point to be added, must not be null.

returns.doc: The index of the added point.

methods.name: AddTriangle
methods.signature: public void AddTriangle(int Index1, int Index2, int Index3)
methods.summary: Adds a new triangle in the mesh.

params.name: Index1
params.doc: The index of the triangle's first point in the points array list.

params.name: Index2
params.doc: The index of the triangle's second point in the points array list.

params.name: Index3
params.doc: The index of the triangle's third point in the points array list.

properties.name: Lines
properties.summary: An array list of indices (as integers) pointing to the points array list. Two consecutive indices always represent a single line.

properties.name: Points
properties.summary: An array list of point objects representing the mesh points.

properties.name: Triangles
properties.summary: An array list of indices (as integers) pointing to the points array list. Three consecutive indices always represent a single triangle.
